name: QA 561
description:
PCP QA Test No. 561

Exercise pmMergeLabels(3) handling of various input data.



Copyright (c) 2016-2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner direct --platform ubuntu1604 reproduce
